Name: London
Description: Cargoes, treasures, weapons, secrets. Mischief.

Shops.Name: Wolfstack Exchange
Shops.Description: Trading in common goods will only earn slim profits. Seek other opportunities.

Shops.Name: The Iron & Misery Company
Shops.Description: [More powerful engines consume more fuel, but increase speed - essential for large slow ships.]

Shops.Name: Carrow's Naval Surplus
Shops.Description: Mr Carrow has found a use for the equipment once sold to the sadly reduced Royal Navy.

Shops.Name: Mrs Plenty's Shipside Provisioners
Shops.Description: The matriarch's primary business since the end of carnivals.

Shops.Name: Signals of Virtue
Shops.Description: Trade in things that can't be found anywhere doesn't seem like a very good business model.

Shops.Name: Ye Olde Debugger's Shoppe
Shops.Description: Because really, we're just here for the stories.

Name: Infernal Canal Staging Area
Description: Coal is cheap, so close to the source, plus the oddities that spring up alongside it.

Shops.Name: Exile Bazaar
Shops.Description: It comes from below.

Name: End Paren
Description: What else are they to do?

Shops.Name: The Fallen Angle
Shops.Description: A mathematician's stall, searching for answers in empty times.

Name: Culicida
Description: Close to the shore, an open-air tent loaded with wares.

Shops.Name: Swarmside Provisions
Shops.Description: "Eh, they don't bother me none."

Name: A Tidy Dock
Description: It's not much, but it'll do.

Shops.Name: The Rusted Pillar
Shops.Description: Your crew insists this cargo was always here. What?

Name: A Busy Port
Description: Traders come from lands you've never heard of, with wares like nothing you've ever seen.

Shops.Name: The Rusted Pillar
Shops.Description: Your crew insists this cargo was always here. What?

Shops.Name: The Heavenly Haven
Shops.Description: Dealers in the otherworldly.

Name: Aphantasia
Description: A great golden hall invites you to spend.

Shops.Name: The Rusted Pillar
Shops.Description: Your crew insists this cargo was always here. What?

Shops.Name: The Heavenly Haven
Shops.Description: Dealers in the otherworldly.

Shops.Name: Alexander's Golden Hall
Shops.Description: You can only imagine finding deals this good.

Name: Port Rosa
Description: The Umwelt Dynasty hoard their wealth like wyrms themselves - but they can't resist a good story.

Shops.Name: The Green House
Shops.Description: Sales for tales.

Shops.Name: The Glass House
Shops.Description: Tales for sale.

Name: Behind Bestiary
Description: You've been invited to a particular sideshow attraction.

Shops.Name: Not A Shop
Shops.Description: "For various reasons, none of us were ever here."

Name: Ztargon's Remains
Description: Most Ozao avoid you entirely. But you come across an alcove not far from port where one is willing to take your money.

Shops.Name: Yyd Hwarwz
Shops.Description: Hateful glowers linger after each exchange.

Shops.Name: Zamut Ywrangl
Shops.Description: The Ozao seem to think nothing of selling these... yet, for obvious reasons, they've never caught on.

Name: Sakura Station
Description: Far from the jingoism you'd expected, the merchants of Namerigawa seem almost overeager to show off their wares and make deals.

Shops.Name: Jihibukai-te
Shops.Description: Ostensibly a teahouse.

Shops.Name: Musician's Corner
Shops.Description: What they lack in money they make up for in tunes.

Name: The Crying Depths
Description: The bustling port is weighed down with stalls.

Shops.Name: Shadow of the Wind
Shops.Description: A rare place where the wind does indeed cast a shadow.

Name: Half-Dreamed Emporium
Description: Deals such as you can only imagine.

Shops.Name: Cacklerock Conventionals
Shops.Description: As conventional as Cacklerock Industries ever gets.

Shops.Name: Cacklerock Exotics
Shops.Description: Bringers of death in brand new forms!

Name: Duskside Dealers
Description: Deals such as you can only imagine.

Shops.Name: Enlightened Illuminations
Shops.Description: Currency of the new order only.

Shops.Name: Implausibility Reckoners
Shops.Description: "If we can't figure it out, no one can. We'll ensure it."

Name: Side Passages
Description: The Theatre's backstage is a maze of dust and things left forgotten.

Shops.Name: The Gift Shop
Shops.Description: This is hidden on your way in, but you must pass through it on the way out.

Name: Inside Alodia
Description: Things that probably shouldn't be for sale are for sale.

Shops.Name: Shining Viscera
Shops.Description: "Her veins clog with dark combustibles. Her organs crack and splinter. Help us fix her."

Name: Imperial Market
Description: Merchants flip new prices onto their wares as you approach.

Shops.Name: The Ever-Rising Sun
Shops.Description: "And HOW do you plan to pay for this, HMMMM???"

Name: The Wyrm Nest
Description: Nothing more fitting for a holy site than exploiting it to make lots of money.

Shops.Name: Uncanny Excavations
Shops.Description: The constantly churning earth uncovers all kinds of things.

Shops.Name: Purgatory Park
Shops.Description: A burial site that offers up prayers for the dead.

Name: All Legs Welcome!
Description: Those with any number of legs can shop here. More is still preferred, of course.

Shops.Name: SILKS-R-WE
Shops.Description: The air reeks of fresh silk and desperation.

Name: Automated Exchange
Description: The Machine is not entirely self-sufficient. These ports allow for exchanges of currency.

Shops.Name: STAND HERE
Shops.Description: The INPUT and OUTPUT chutes are clearly labeled.

Name: Trojan's Rook
Description: Scrumptious deals for unscrupulous captains.

Shops.Name: The Well Hanged Man
Shops.Description: It's assuredly not a pun.

Shops.Name: Matchmaker's Court
Shops.Description: What's the harm in a little labour exchange?

Name: Majesty's Pride
Description: A tiny settlement on the edge of nowhere.

Shops.Name: Hastily Assembled Shacks
Shops.Description: It can't all get much more dismal than this.

Name: Let's Make Some Money!
Description: Worship of Silver is practiced through mutually beneficial commerce.

Shops.Name: The Allmarket
Shops.Description: Everything must go!

Shops.Name: Silver's Stash
Shops.Description: Are you captain enough to make deals with a god?

Name: Scattered Stalls
Description: Scattered stalls on the dock-side.

Shops.Name: Harbour Provisioners
Shops.Description: A sluggish and hostile merchant squints warily. A few goods of indifferent quality are available.
